case_title: ANNELLA WYNYARD VS. KEGAN GREENE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT GREENE, KEGAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ANNELLA WYNYAD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ADRIAN COLLEY IS PRESENT DEFENDANT KEGAN GREENE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SIAO GREENE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM AND REPRESENTED BY KEGAN GREENE, HUSBAND. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WYNYARD, ANNELLA FOR THE COLLEY-WYNARD FAMILY TRUST COLLEY, ADRIAN FOR THE COLLEY-WYNARD FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENE, KEGAN GREENE, SIAO LINN $7,041.06 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,116.06, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WYNYARD, ANNELLA FOR THE COLLEY-WYNARD FAMILY TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT GREENE, KEGAN GREENE, SIAO LINN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
